sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Keima lungsim sung hong om in
Nang ading omna a om hi
Nang ading omna a om hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh in a hong kumsuk laitak in
Hih hang gina lo bek tawh

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ngia in zong kua nei a vasa in zong
Singdawn ah buu a nei uh hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh in zawhna tawh hong paisuk ciang
Pengkul aw tawh hong pai ding hi
Ka kiang om in hong ci ding hi
